name: Mustard Seed and Papaya Chutney
recipeIngredient: 3 Ripe papayas, peeled, seeded and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE white vinegar, water, sugar, and mustard seeds in a 1-quart pan.
2. PLACE the pan over medium heat and bring the mixture to a boil.
3. COOK until the liquid becomes syrupy.
4. ADD the papayas and curry powder to the pan. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. TURN OFF the heat and mix in the finely diced onion.
6. PACK the mixture into a jar and refrigerate for at least one week before using.
Makes 1 Quart
